reviews.review_description: The game is nothing like the video shows or the picture shows. All you do is put guns together. I was expecting you to be able to shoot them can barely shoot them. I was expecting you to play with other people you cannot do that I was expecting a sandbox mode that’s not in this game is nothing Like the videos

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for taking the time to share this ... we understand where the frustration is coming from.

Gun X is designed a bit differently from traditional shooters. The core gameplay is intentionally focused on assembling weapons under pressure and then using them strategically, rather than constant free shooting. That said, you can shoot,  but timing, assembly, and survival mechanics are a big part of the challenge. 

Still there is easy mode where you are supposed to assemble once and start shotting the waves of zombies, or play Duel PvP ( best of 3 ) and a shotting range to practice.

Please do mail us, if you need any further understanding. Appreciate you calling this out. 🙏

reviews.review_description: Its fun and gets challenging.

There’s endless shooters to choose from in VR, but this stands apart from the rest with its uniqueness. Assembling guns under intense pressure seriously gets my heart rate going lol. The QOL updates have been game changing… so much easier to learn/use the workshop table now… much more streamlined. 

A couple critiques/bugs: 
- Iron sights are a little rough with the rifle, and the gun can feel a little floaty/weightless at times. 
- the rifle recoil seems a bit excessive right now… firing anymore than 1-2 bullets at a time is tough. Your 2nd bullet might hit the head but the 3rd shot misses high by 3 or 4ft… the longer you hold the trigger the more excessive it becomes… It’s something I’d expect if I were holding the rifle with 1, not 2 hands
- sometimes my hands were getting caught in the drawers, and other times it was difficult to grab the bottle/rag. 
- any way to add a button to start a wave when ready early? Sometimes I’m sitting there for 30 seconds before an enemy appears. 

Other than these minor quibbles, GunX is an easy recommendation for any shooter fan. The dev seems very dedicated to improving the game… Lots of updates/bug fixes since release. These are the kind of devs/games I love supporting…. Hope this gets more attention. Keep up the great work!

Final score (after a couple hours only… I’ll update my review and score when i finish):
9.1/10

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the feedback and also the love.

We will definitely look into the gun recoils and on the wave readiness.

reviews.review_description: My son and I were waiting on co op. Disappointed the we dont have separate tables. It's too crowded and we fumble over each other trying to put the weapons together.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We’ve just released version 1.2, which adds separate tables for each player along with several other improvements to make co-op smoother and more enjoyable.

reviews.review_title: Impressive VR Shooter Co op game
reviews.review_description:
The game play is really good.The way you have to assemble the guns and start shooting the zombies makes a lot of difference from other games. 

Played with my friends really loved it

Best co-op game 🧟‍♂️
The way we can assemble the guns made me feel its real. 🧟‍♀️
Its very challenging and exciting.
I recommend it to everyone 🕹️

Crazy game! You learn to build guns. You play campaigns, where you build your guns and then kill zombies. You earn some cash, upgrade your guns, and buy more guns. Repeat. 

The levels get harder and faster. The zombies get faster and bigger and more crazy. It's a rush. It's intense. You make mistakes, and it is genuinely scary. 

Not meant for those with heart problems, for those who scare easily, possibly also not great for pregnant women (unless they are bad as). This game gets your heart pumping. Oh, did I mention you get guns,  and you have to BUILD your guns! 

Practice makes perfect. And I'm still scared. I can almost build a gun with my eyes closed! Almost. Lol. 

OK, so why only 4 stars? I found the introduction a little confusing, I got stuck building a gun for the longest time, not realizing what I was meant to do. And it took me a while to realize where the return to menu button was (far left side). I also had some issues picking up the pieces sometimes. Maybe this is on purpose, to male you stressed out MORE. Haha. The game graphics are pretty sick though, and anyone who loves guns will really enjoy this one.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the love! ❤️

Your points on Intro and Menu are well noted and we’ll be working on smoothing those out so the action grabs you right away (without the unintentional confusion… unless we do want to stress you out 😏)

reviews.review_title: A unique twist on zombie survival
reviews.review_description: Assemble your weapon on the fly and fight for your life.

reviews.review_title: Cross between a puzzle and FPS
reviews.review_description:
You have to quickly assemble your gun to use it to fight waves of Zombies. It is a pretty fun, but stressful concept that requires you to really strategize when you are going to shoot, and when you will have time to recharge your gun. 

Rather than reloading, you have to deposit your empty weapon and wait for a new, disassembled one to spawn, but during that time you can use molotov cocktails, explosives and shields to defend yourself.

I haven't spent too much time with this title yet, and I haven't played multiplayer yet, but so far it is a really unique and fun experience.

I thought this was going to be a basic zombie shooter, but it’s way more strategic than I expected. You have to build your guns, manage your ammo carefully, and time everything just right so that you’re not unarmed at the worst possible moment. It gets intense fast, but that’s part of the fun.

Every shot counts, and the pressure makes it super satisfying when you pull off a clean run. Stressful in the best way. Definitely worth checking out if you like fast-paced VR games with a twist!

developer_response.body: Thank  you and hope coop should be even more fun! Coming soon...

reviews.review_description: Having to build a gun together from scratch while hordes of zombies are coming after you is heart pounding! I highly recommend PRACTICE PRACTICE PRACTICE putting guns together till it’s muscle memory in the gun range before you start the campaign or you’re going to have a BAD time. So cool having an experience of putting together guns in VR. Awesome game! Highly recommend.

developer_response.body: Thank you ! Glad you liked the intensity... And yes, practice makes survival!!

reviews.review_description: Suprisingly fun and indepth wave shooter. Trying to put your gun together as the panic sets in is something else! Have started playing around with the molotovs and pipe bombs, a lot of fun and Im eager to see how coop mode is.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the feedback!
coop is coming soon and it’s an absolute blast. 🔥
The real challenge? In the middle of chaos, it’s all about how your partner keeps their cool and has your back.
We can’t wait to hear what you think once it drops!

reviews.review_description: One of the best games in VR, it is so realistic and it was fun playing . The best part is assembling the gun 🔫. Give it a try you will love it .

reviews.review_title: a new take on gun play
reviews.review_description: I love how unique and creative this game is. It's like other shooting and zombie games but with a twist. It's the ultimate VR shooting game that elevates your gaming experience to new heights because you have to swiftly assemble your firearms, engage in heart pounding Duel Matches (PvP), and survive against relentless waves in Zombie Mode (single player; co-op coming soon). Be the first to assemble your weapon and shoot your opponent down in a best of three match. Unlock and purchase weapons in the intense Zombie Mode for the ultimate survival challenge. Weapon handling is realistic. Zombie mode is intense. Be sure to practice, practice, and practice assembling the weapons. Check out my videos on YT @misschiefvr

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for the awesome review — you totally nailed it on the gameplay!
We’re stoked you enjoyed the weapon assembly and the twist on PvP and zombie mode. Co-op is on the way, and we’re working on even more cool stuff. Really appreciate the love ❤️

reviews.review_title: A game that is like a simulator
reviews.review_description: So if you're looking for a fun game that's immersive and is like a simulator you found it. This game allows you to put together your weapons so teaches you how they're made in a sense. Allows you to use those weapons against hordes of enemies. They're also a few surprises like a molative cocktail or making a stick of dynamite lol. If you looking for something that's a little bit different and a lot of fun you really should check this out.

developer_response.body: Thanks a bunch! Glad you enjoyed the immersive build-and-blast vibe — and those surprises too.

reviews.review_description:
A Unique and Intense VR Experience – Strategy Meets Survival!

This game brilliantly merges two exciting concepts into one immersive VR experience. You're dropped into an isolated area with nothing but a desk and disassembled weapons. Your first mission? Assemble your gear under pressure—because the zombie waves are coming fast.

The deeper you go, the more strategic the gameplay becomes. Ammo is limited, and requesting resupplies takes time. Every decision matters. Rebuilding your weapon while under threat forces you to think fast and act smart. It’s tense, rewarding, and incredibly well-executed.

And the cherry on top? Multiplayer is coming soon! Imagine teammates covering you while you reload or set traps like dynamite to take out groups of enemies. That’s next-level strategy, and it’s on the horizon.

If you're looking for a fresh take on the zombie wave genre with real tactical depth—this is it. Give it a try, you won’t be disappointed. An excellent game all around!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the fantastic review and for diving deep into the mechanics—we truly appreciate your insights!

Just to share a quick update: Multiplayer PvP Duel mode is already live and available to play! The Co-op multiplayer mode you're referring to is currently in development and will soon be released to complement the single-player Zombie campaign.

We’re excited to bring that next level of strategy and teamwork you mentioned.

reviews.review_description: There are tons of zombie games out there, and this is a very unique take on gun and zombie games. You must first assemble your gun, something unique I have not seen in VR. The guns snap together nicely and you must defend yourself with multiple weapons against the zombie horde. Right now there is a dual game type for pvp and single player missions with multiplayer co-op coming soon. I would recommend this to any gun enthusiast.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the love and recommendation!

reviews.review_description:
#––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––#
__& So, I will be honest, the game look nice and i like the mechanic but reassembling the gun every time you are out of ammo is a bit, no fun, even if i like the concept the fact that we need to rebuild the gun every time kill the fun. Im like the games but i will not give 5 stars &__
#––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––#

developer_response.body:
Hey Superhydra! thanks for the feedback! We just did something exactly what players like you were asking for in the game! A one-time Assembly( Casual Mode ) and lots of fun, without compromising on the original gameplay ( Regular Mode ).

Now you have even the Guided assembling, with lots of other cool updates!

Hope we nailed it for you!💥 

Please do check out our new patch update 1.0.2 released today!

reviews.review_description:
I appreciate how this game does something different from other zombie wave shooters. At the start you have to assemble each weapon before the zombies reach you and it can get intense the further you get into the game. The more you play you receive a currency used to upgrade your weapons to help in the waves.  There are also resources you have to manage a bit that are to make bombs, molotov and gain a defensive shield to buy you some time in those frantic moments. 

Along with the zombie mode is a 1v1 mode where you dual another player to see who is the quickest to assemble their gun and take the first shot. There's also a shooting range to get familiar with the assembly of each weapon that helps very much. A co-op mode is coming soon for the zombie mode. Can't wait to see what else is in store for the game

The tutorial is a little bit frustrating at times picking things up isn't as smooth as U would like it to be and it's just a tad bit frustrating at times I found.  But overall it's different to other shooting games which is a good step in the right direction to have something different from others is really good. Nobody wants the same shooting games over and over. 

I would say simplify the tutorial and make it super basic. The way it is right now it's not going to be something everyone can pick up and get into

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks a lot for the honest feedback ! we took it seriously and made some big changes in the new Patch 1.0.2 🙌

Tutorial is now smoother and integrated into main missions

Guided assembly makes building much easier

Added Casual & Regular modes so anyone can jump in

Plus tons of quality-of-life fixes

Waited this long to reply, as we wanted to reply with actionable update and here it is!

Would love for you to check it out and see what you think now!

reviews.review_description: This is a very unique game with great action. This is a fast-paced game, with cool graphics in which you will always be entertained!
